title: Insecure Data Storage Allows Modification
description: Without knowing the data classification or storage mechanisms, there's a risk that sensitive data is stored without proper protection against modification.  This could include vulnerabilities in the database or application code allowing unauthorized data changes.
attack_vector: SQL injection, application vulnerabilities allowing direct data modification, compromised application code.
mitigations: Implement robust input validation and sanitization to prevent SQL injection and other injection attacks.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ data loss prevention (DLP) mechanisms to monitor and prevent unauthorized data modifications.
